content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=”1/4″]

  • 4N-5D Armenia
  • 5N-6D Nepal
  • 5N-6D Spain
  • 4N-5D Paris
  • 4N-5D Zurich
  • 4N-5D London
  • 5N-6D Mauritius
  • 3N-4D Male
  • 4N-5D Egypt
  • 6N-7D Turkey
  • 5N-6D Russia
[/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″][vc_column_text el_class=”tabledaily”]

Trip to Egypt
Duration 3 Nights / 4 Days
No of People 2 Adults
No of Rooms 1 Double Rooms
Transportation SIC

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Tour Itinerary” use_theme_fonts=”yes”]

Day 01: Arrive Maldives

Assemble at the Airport to board a flight to Male. On arrival at Male International airport, meet our tour representative and transfer to resort by Speedbaot . Arrive and check in at Hotel. The day free & overnight stay in Male resort.

Day 02: Maldives

Full day free to explore the beaches. Overnight at hotel.

Day 03: Maldives

Full day free to explore the beaches. Overnight at hotel.

Day 04: Maldives

After breakfast proceed to the airport to board a flight back India.
[vc_column_text el_class=”tabledaily”]

RESORT NAME ROOM TYPE COST PER PERSON
Centara ras fushi 3N Water Villa 79999 INR

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Package Inclusions
  • 3 Nights stay based on double Sharing include daily breakfast.
  • 3 Breakfast.
  • 3 Lunches.
  • 3 Dinner.
  • Airport/ Resort /Airport transfers in Maldives.
  • Airport to resort by Speedboat.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Package Exclusion
  • Other foods.
  • GST 5%.
  • Supplement Charges at hotels on Christmas and New Year’s Eve.
  • Permits for cameras and videos at sights.
  • Tips, beverages, mineral water, laundry & any personal expenses, etc.
  • Any items not shown in the package includes.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Reservation Policy
  1. Package confirmation is subject to receipt of 60% payment & the balance, 3 weeks from initial fee.
  2. Hotels are subjected to availability, if not available similar category will be provided.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Note
  • No bookings have been done; the above is only a proposal & subject to availability of services.
  • The above itinerary acts as a guideline of the tour, hence the days & timing of the sightseeing tours are subject to change.
  • Standard type rooms will be offered in all category hotels otherwise it stated.
  • The Airfare is subject to change at the time of confirmation.
  • Early check-in & late check-out is not allowed under hotel’s discretion.

Hope the given details are clear and in order, for further clarification feel free to call us.

We assure you best services all the time, looking forward your confirmation for the same at the earliest to avoid last minute hassles Thank you.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]
